data.description: German Economy Ministry: Indicators Point To Continued Economic Recovery At Start Of Year - Monthly Report

Tech and Communication Services are carrying the earnings load with near-perfect beat rates. Energy remains strong at 90%. However, Healthcare and Consumer Discretionary have emerged as the primary laggards, both falling into negative growth territory.

data.title: North America leads in modified starch market with 34% revenue in 2025, set to surpass $19.90B globally by 2031.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India, on February 13, 2026, it was reported that the worldwide modified starch market is currently worth USD 17.15 billion in 2026. The market is expected to grow significantly and reach USD 19.90 billion by 2031, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 2.67% over the forecast period. This market expansion trend underscores the increasing demand for modified starch in various industries.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs lose $410M, Standard Chartered reduces Bitcoin target to $100,000 by 2026 causing US spot Bitcoin ETFs to have 4 weeks of losses.
data.description: For the fourth straight week, US spot Bitcoin ETFs are facing losses with Standard Chartered reducing its Bitcoin target for 2026 to $100,000.

data.title: Prazen unveils ultra-thin optical module: 5mm thick, 50° field of view, and 50% efficiency. Impressive advancements in AR tech.
data.description: A company based in Seoul, South Korea, Prazen, recently revealed their achievement in creating an advanced ultra-thin optical module. This innovative module boasts a remarkable 5 mm thickness, along with an impressive 50° field of view (FoV) and 50% optical efficiency. These specs mark a significant advancement in AR technology.

data.title: Europe's electricity system faces growing threats due to war and attacks; Eurelectric report emphasizes need for strengthened defenses.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, in Brussels, it was reported that the conflict between Russia and Ukraine has highlighted a concerning reality - Europe's power system is increasingly vulnerable to attacks. The ongoing war has demonstrated that the electricity grids in Europe are now at risk of being targeted. Even during times of peace, the continent's energy infrastructure is facing challenges from hybrid and cyber warfare. In light of these threats, Eurelectric, a leading industry association representing the European electricity sector, announced today...

data.title: Gaotu Techedu Inc. will report Q4 and fiscal year 2025 financial results on March 5, 2026. Headquarters in Beijing.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Gaotu Techedu Inc. (NYSE: GOTU), a prominent tech-based education firm in China emphasizing lifelong learning with AI-driven tools, disclosed its upcoming financial report. The company is known for its innovative approach and commitment to enhancing learning experiences in the country.

data.title: Appier reports record revenue of JPY 43.7 billion for FY25, up 28% YoY, driven by AI innovation in e-commerce and online travel. Strong guidance for FY26.
data.description: E-commerce and online travel sectors are driving significant growth and positivity for the fiscal year 2026 in Tokyo. Notable accomplishments for the fiscal year 2025 include achieving a record revenue of JPY 43.7 billion, marking a 28% increase compared to the previous year. Moreover, the company has provided strong guidance, indicating an optimistic outlook.

data.title: Video by China.org.cn features stories of 10 Chinese friends and 1 international friend on Spring Festival, highlighting childhood memories, reunions, feasts, and holiday plans.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, a video produced by China.org.cn showcased the Spring Festival experiences of 10 Chinese individuals and one international friend. The video touched on various themes such as childhood memories, heartfelt reunions, elaborate New Year's Eve celebrations, and holiday arrangements. This content provided insight into the evolving traditions and customs surrounding the Spring Festival.
